title: Korean Cheese Fries
description: A spicy and savory twist on classic fries, topped with crispy cheese and a sprinkle of magic.

ingredients.name: stir-fry oil
ingredients.notes: such as peanut or vegetable oil

instructions: Cut potatoes into fry shapes and soak in cold water for at least 30 minutes.
Drain potatoes and pat dry with paper towels.
Toss potatoes with 1 tbsp stir-fry oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until crispy, flipping halfway.
In a small pan, heat remaining 1 tbsp stir-fry oil over medium heat.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add korean chili flakes and cook for an additional minute.
Top baked fries with cheese, crispy bacon bits (if using), and toasted sesame seeds (if using).
Return to oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, until cheese is melted.
Garnish with green onions and serve immediately.
